final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: cinematic scene illustration, wide landscape
Primary request: post-apocalyptic wasteland scene with a heavily modified armored vehicle in a desolate desert, collapsed city ruins in the distance, dust-filled sky
Scene/backdrop: vast barren desert wasteland, crumbling skyscraper ruins on the horizon, swirling sandstorm filling the air
Subject: heavily armored and modified off-road vehicle with welded metal plates, scrap-metal spikes, chains, and jury-rigged weaponry; parked or rolling across cracked dry earth
Style/medium: photorealistic digital painting, post-apocalyptic concept art
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot, low horizon line, vehicle positioned mid-ground, ruins receding into dusty background, slight low-angle perspective
Lighting/mood: dim ochre and amber sunlight filtered through thick dust haze, oppressive and tense atmosphere, harsh shadows, end-of-world survival tension
Color palette: desaturated ochre, burnt sienna, ash grey, rust orange, murky yellow sky
Materials/textures: rusted corroded metal panels, cracked parched earth, swirling fine sand particles, crumbling concrete rubble
Avoid: clean modern vehicles, blue sky, lush vegetation, cheerful lighting
